summary: Tambah field file_url di GET /scylla-pjp/v1/live-monitoring-distributor dan /live-monitoring-principal (SX-2421, SX-2422). Source: mobile.visits.file_url (visit terbaru per cust/emp/outlet/date). Distributor reuse pola GetDistributorLatestVisitCoordinates; principal tambah correlated subquery di select GetPrincipalMonitoring & GetPrincipalExtraCalls. Tipe *string, json tanpa omitempty.
decisions: Pakai *string FileURL; NULLIF di select untuk normalisasi empty jadi null. Subquery SELECT (bukan window) untuk principal demi simplicity. subagent-handoff-check.py butuh fenced block JSON dengan key handoff: di root; YAML mini parser-nya overwrite nested map, jadi JSON lebih aman.

summary: SX-2513 product secondary sales report delivered: POST /master/v1/products/report added to master with parameter-bound count/data, composite parent join, closed sort allowlist, and full test/build PASS. Quality gate verdict PASS_WITH_RISKS: A3 parent-missing behavior remains open and runtime smoke is not-ready because compose is empty and no token available.
decisions: Repository uses sqlx.In+Rebind for cust_id list; A1 fake service stub originally had stale 2-return signature and was synchronized to 4-return during A2 remediation; quality gate verified A1/A2/A3 evidence and diff boundary.

summary: SX-2513 remediation A4 closed: live ggn_scyllax revealed mst.m_distributor has 38 rows per cust_id, multiplying report join 38x (API 148846 vs actual 3917 for C22001, duplicate pro_id). Fixed by grouping md into BOOL_OR(COALESCE(allow_upload_secondary_sales,false)) derived relation before join. Live re-validated: API total 3917 == DB 3917, 0 duplicate pro_id in 100-row page; C260020004 mapping fixture (6 rows) parent-normalizes correctly against C26002. Quality gate re-reviewed and issued PASS (superseding prior PASS_WITH_RISKS).
decisions: mst.m_distributor is not unique per cust_id in this dataset; any join on cust_id must aggregate first. Chose BOOL_OR across all distributor rows per cust_id as the smallest compliant flag semantic; documented as open assumption pending product-owner confirmation only if disputed.
